# kSecCodeInfoIdentifier

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is the signing identifier sealed into the signature.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoIdentifier: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] object. Absent for unsigned code.

This is generic information returned regardless of which [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/code-signing-information-flags] you pass to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopySigningInformation(_:_:_:)] function.
